title: GD/P-013: slugger dedup collision fix (github-style produced-slug registration) + doc uplift
description: Owned files: projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py, projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py ONLY. Depends on T-038 (mdtoc contract coherence). Fix F4: naive base->count dedup emits duplicate anchors on ['Foo','Foo','Foo-1'] (['foo','foo-1','foo-1']). Adopt github-slugger collision handling: register PRODUCED slugs in seen as well, so a later base equal to an earlier produced slug gets bumped (['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1']). The golden 24/24 MUST still pass (verify with vectors.run_against - no produced-slug collisions exist in the golden set). Update the module docstring: document dedup semantics precisely (F5 uplift: adopt the cited-rule-table doc style from candidates/slugger_c.py for the dedup section; cite github-slugger slugger.prototype.slug). Regression tests: Foo/Foo/Foo-1 yields unique anchors; len(set)==len over a stress list of colliding bases. Acceptance: vectors 24/24 green; new collision tests pass; full suite green; py_compile clean; tournament-pinned behaviors (tab, U+3000, NFD) untouched and their tests still pass.

notes.note: plan: register produced slugs in seen (github-slugger occurrences style) to fix F4 collision; invert the naive-collision test pin in test_slugger.py to the new collision-safe outcome; add stress regression; doc uplift (F5) with cited rule table; verify golden 24/24 before+after and full suite

DONE: implemented github-slugger-style produced-slug registration in slugify() (RULE 1 bumps base counter, RULE 2 re-registers the produced/suffixed slug into seen, dict shape unchanged: str->int, mutated in place). BEFORE: vectors.run_against 24/24; ['Foo','Foo','Foo-1'] -> ['foo','foo-1','foo-1'] (collision, len(set)=2!=3). AFTER: vectors.run_against still 24/24 (no golden vector exercises a produced-slug collision, so RULE 2 is purely additive); ['Foo','Foo','Foo-1'] -> ['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1'] (unique); stress list ['Item','Item','Item','Item-1','Item-1','Item-2'] -> all 6 unique. py_compile clean on both files. Full suite: 71 -> 72 (removed 1 pinned-collision test, added 2: inverted collision pin + stress test). DECISION (test-pin inversion): TestDedupCollisionContract.test_foo_foo_foo1_produces_contract_collision (pinned the NAIVE ['foo','foo-1','foo-1'] outcome as a tournament-agreed CONTRACT) renamed/rewritten to test_foo_foo_foo1_no_longer_collides pinning ['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1']; docstring states EXPECTED-before vs ACTUAL-after per P-013/F4, cites this task. Doc uplift (F5): rewrote slugger.py's dedup docs in slugger_c.py's cited-rule-table style (RULE 1/RULE 2/RULE 3), citing github-slugger's slugger.prototype.slug occurrences re-registration as upstream source; appended (did not rewrite) a note to the historical T-027 SCORE SUMMARY dedup-collision bullet clarifying it was superseded by T-039, so the B-vs-A-vs-C verdict record stays intact. Tournament-pinned tests untouched verbatim: test_tab_becomes_hyphen, test_ideographic_space_u3000_becomes_hyphen, test_nfd_combining_acute_is_kept, test_full_golden_suite_passes_24_of_24 -- all still pass. Only owned files touched: slugger.py, test_slugger.py.

HANDOFF -> verifier: Replay: (1) python3 -m py_compile projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py -> expect clean/no output. (2) cd projects/mdtoc && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); sys.path.insert(0,'candidates'); import vectors; from mdtoc.slugger import slugify; print(vectors.run_against(slugify)[:2])" -> expect (24, 24). (3) python3 -m unittest discover -s projects/mdtoc/tests -t projects/mdtoc -v -> expect 72 tests, OK (was 71; net +1: 1 pinned-collision test rewritten in place is a rename not a delta, +1 new stress test). (4) Collision regression: cd projects/mdtoc && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from mdtoc.slugger import slugify; seen={}; out=[slugify(x,seen) for x in ['Foo','Foo','Foo-1']]; print(out, len(set(out))==len(out))" -> expect (['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1'], True). Verify: (a) golden 24/24 preserved (F4 fix is additive-only, confirmed no golden vector hits a produced-slug collision); (b) tab/U+3000/NFD tournament pins in test_slugger.py are byte-for-byte untouched (only TestDedupCollisionContract was edited); (c) the inverted pin's docstring states EXPECTED (naive collision) vs ACTUAL (collision-safe) per P-013/F4 and cites T-039; (d) seen-dict shape unchanged (still str->int, mutated in place -- diff mdtoc/slugger.py's slugify() signature is untouched, only its body + docstring changed); (e) doc uplift: module docstring's DEDUP RULE TABLE cites github-slugger's slugger.prototype.slug occurrences re-registration, mirrors candidates/slugger_c.py's cited-rule-table style, and the historical T-027 SCORE SUMMARY dedup bullet was appended-to (not rewritten) to preserve the tournament record. Only owned files touched: projects/mdtoc/mdtoc/slugger.py, projects/mdtoc/tests/test_slugger.py.

VERIFIED (verifier-c, adversarial replay + differential oracle). REPLAY: py_compile both owned files clean (exit 0); vectors.run_against(slugify)=passed,total,failures=(24,24,[]); full suite 72 tests OK (tab/U+3000/NFD/golden-24 pins all pass). COLLISION FIX (mdtoc.slugify, run live): ['Foo','Foo','Foo-1']->['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1'] unique; stress ['Item']x3+['Item-1']x2+['Item-2']->['item','item-1','item-2','item-1-1','item-1-2','item-2-1'] unique. HOSTILE CASES (mine): (a)['A','A','A','A-1','A-1-1']->['a','a-1','a-2','a-1-1','a-1-1-1'] unique; (b)['b-1','b','b']->['b-1','b','b-2'] unique; (c)['x','x-1','x','x-1']->['x','x-1','x-2','x-1-1'] unique; (d) 200 random-ish repeated-base trials: 0 uniqueness failures. ALGORITHM-READ: code checks the MUTATING candidate (while slug in seen) + bumps base counter + re-registers produced slug (seen[slug]=0) = faithful port of github-slugger BananaSlug.prototype.slug. Differential test vs an independent gh-slugger reimpl: 0 parity divergences across all cases + 200 trials. Subtle case resolved: after literal ['foo','foo-1'], a 3rd 'foo'->'foo-2' (loop skips taken foo-1, bumps base) -- matches github EXACTLY (gh oracle also 'foo-2'); no divergence. GITHUB PARITY: code=full parity. DOC NIT (non-blocking, not a reject per criteria: algorithm does NOT diverge): the illustrative pseudocode block in slugger.py's DEDUP RULE TABLE writes 'while (originalSlug in occurrences)' where both upstream and the actual code use the mutating var ('while slug in seen' / 'while result in occurrences'); as literally written that pseudocode is an infinite loop. Prose RULE 1/2/3 + citations are all accurate; recommend a follow-up 1-token doc fix (originalSlug->slug in the while line). PIN-INVERSION legitimacy: TestDedupCollisionContract honestly documents EXPECTED-before ['foo','foo-1','foo-1'] vs ACTUAL-after ['foo','foo-1','foo-1-1'], cites F4/P-013 + the RULE TABLE, explains the old pin asserted a real collision as 'correct' -- legitimate, citated inversion. SEEN-DICT interface: signature 'slugify(text,seen)->str' unchanged (git diff), still str->int mutated in place; end-to-end 'python3 -m mdtoc generate' on a dup-heading fixture emitted 9/9 unique well-formed anchors incl. literal '## Foo 1'->foo-1-1. BOUNDARY: git diff touches ONLY the 2 owned files for T-039's scope; parser/inserter/candidates/vectors/test_parser/test_inserter unmodified; cli/test_cli/test_integration mods are T-038 (depth, no slug/dedup logic). DISCIPLINE: task was in review (handoff, NOT self-done); no dangling locks. HOUSEKEEPING: lock.py status=no active locks, sweep=0 expired.
